raw_consumer_statement:
CASE TYPE : URGENT APPEAL OF FRAUD DENIAL & ILLEGAL CREDIT REVERSAL. 

AMOUNT IN DISPUTE : {$49000.00} ( Original Claim ) + {$6600.00} ( Clawed-back Provisional Credit ). 

THE INCIDENT : On XX/XX/XXXX, American Express denied my fraud claim stating " our previous decision stands. '' On XX/XX/XXXX, Amex removed a previously issued provisional credit of {$6600.00}. This is an immediate appeal of that decision. 

THE PROCEDURAL ERROR : The " previous decision '' referenced by Amex was rendered without reviewing mandatory federal evidence that was inadvertently routed to a decommissioned fax line/portal during the initial submission. Therefore, the previous decision was based on an incomplete file and is legally invalid. The " XXXX XXXX '' rationale relies on the premise that a " XXXX XXXX '' equals " Authorization. '' This is legally incorrect. Possession of my username/password allowed a hacker to access my saved profile, but access does not equal authorization. 

THE PHYSICAL POSSESSION DEFENSE : I possess the physical credit card. For any transaction flagged as " In-Person '' or " Service Establishment, '' Amex is relying on " Chip Security '' or " Merchant Logs '' to prove my presence. However, I was physically in possession of the card at the time of these charges. Therefore, these transactions were executed via cloned hardware ( XXXX XXXX ), not by me. Amex can not use " XXXX XXXX '' to override the fact that I hold the original card. 

THE VIOLATION : Amex ignored mandatory federal evidence submitted on XX/XX/XXXX : FTC Identity Theft Report ( Ref # XXXX ) : Per 15 U.S.C. 1681e ( k ) ( 1 ), this carries the full legal weight of a police report. It is prima facie evidence of identity theft. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX : Documenting my XXXX ( XX/XX/XXXX ). 
By denying this claim without reviewing this evidencespecifically the XXXX explanation for the timelineAmex is violating the Americans with XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ). 

THE DEMAND : Immediately reinstate the provisional credit of {$6600.00} that was removed. 
Re-open the investigation for the full {$49000.00}. 
Escalate to the XXXX XXXX. The standard " XXXX XXXX XXXX '' team failed to review the evidence and incorrectly applied " XXXX XXXX '' logic to a shimming/XXXX case. 
I am unable to resolve this via phone as representatives ignored the XXXX documentation and failed to understand the physical possession doctrine.
